objective: Distinguish between perimeter (distance around) and area (space inside) and calculate both for rectangles

pretest.question: What is the difference between perimeter and area?
choices: Perimeter is the space inside; area is the distance around
Perimeter is the distance around; area is the space inside
pretest.answer: Perimeter is the distance around; area is the space inside

learn.title: 둘레 vs 넓이 — 정의와 공식 차이
learn.content: PERIMETER = distance AROUND a shape. Measured in linear units (cm, m, ft). AREA = space INSIDE a shape. Measured in square units (sq cm, sq m, sq ft). For a rectangle: P = (l + w) × 2. Area = l × w. Example: Rectangle 7 cm × 3 cm. P = (7+3)×2 = 20 cm. Area = 7 × 3 = 21 sq cm. 예: A rectangle is 8 cm long and 2 cm wide. What is the perimeter AND the area? → Perimeter = 20 cm, Area = 16 square cm. (P = (8+2)×2 = 20 cm. Area = 8×2 = 16 sq cm.)

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.10 Lesson 10.4 'Same Perimeter, Different Areas / Same Area, Different Perimeters' pp.425-428
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 7 Lessons 19-20 — Perimeter & Area Relationships
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: 같은 둘레, 다른 넓이
learn.content: Two shapes can have the SAME perimeter but DIFFERENT areas. Rectangle A: 6×2 → P=16, Area=12. Rectangle B: 5×3 → P=16, Area=15. Same perimeter (16), different area! 예: Rectangle A is 7 cm × 1 cm. Rectangle B is 4 cm × 4 cm. Do they have the same perimeter? Which has greater area? → Both have perimeter 16 cm. Rectangle B has greater area (16 sq cm vs 7 sq cm).. (A: P=(7+1)×2=16, Area=7. B: P=(4+4)×2=16, Area=16. Same P, B has greater area.)

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.10 Lesson 10.4 'Same Perimeter, Different Areas / Same Area, Different Perimeters' pp.425-428
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 7 Lessons 19-20 — Perimeter & Area Relationships
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: 같은 넓이, 다른 둘레
learn.content: Two shapes can have the SAME area but DIFFERENT perimeters. Rectangle A: 8×2 → Area=16, P=20. Rectangle B: 4×4 → Area=16, P=16. Same area (16 sq units), different perimeters! 예: Rectangle A is 9 cm × 1 cm. Rectangle B is 3 cm × 3 cm. Do they have the same area? Which has greater perimeter? → Both have area 9 sq cm. Rectangle A has greater perimeter (20 cm vs 12 cm).. (A: Area=9×1=9, P=(9+1)×2=20. B: Area=3×3=9, P=(3+3)×2=12. Same area, A has greater perimeter.)

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.10 Lesson 10.4 'Same Perimeter, Different Areas / Same Area, Different Perimeters' pp.425-428
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 7 Lessons 19-20 — Perimeter & Area Relationships
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: 단위 구분 — 길이 vs 제곱
learn.content: 둘레 단위: cm, m, in, ft (길이 단위 = 1차원). 넓이 단위: cm², m², sq in, sq ft (제곱 단위 = 2차원).   ⚠️ 둘레에 cm² 쓰면 안 됨 / 넓이에 cm 쓰면 안 됨 (M03 함정). 🔍 검산: 답이 더하기 결과면 cm, 곱하기 결과면 cm².

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.10 Lesson 10.4 'Same Perimeter, Different Areas / Same Area, Different Perimeters' pp.425-428
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 7 Lessons 19-20 — Perimeter & Area Relationships
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: 둘 다 계산하는 루틴
learn.content: 직사각형 l × w 받으면 둘 다 계산:   ① P = 2×(l+w) → 단위 cm.   ② A = l × w → 단위 cm². 예: l=6, w=4 → P=20 cm, A=24 cm². 🔍 같은 도형이라도 P와 A는 다른 양 — 헷갈리지 말기.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.10 Lesson 10.4 'Same Perimeter, Different Areas / Same Area, Different Perimeters' pp.425-428
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 7 Lessons 19-20 — Perimeter & Area Relationships
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: 정사각형 특별 케이스
learn.content: 정사각형 변 s:   P = 4 × s (선의 합).   A = s × s = s² (면 채움). 예: s=5 → P=20 cm, A=25 cm².   ⚠️ 4×5=20 (둘레)과 5×5=25 (넓이) — 다른 답. 정사각형은 같은 변끼리 곱·합 — 가장 헷갈리는 케이스. 단위로 구분!

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.10 Lesson 10.4 'Same Perimeter, Different Areas / Same Area, Different Perimeters' pp.425-428
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 7 Lessons 19-20 — Perimeter & Area Relationships
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: 어느 걸 써야? — 실생활 결정
learn.content: 둘레가 필요한 경우 (가장자리 / 둘레 길이):   · 펜스 길이, 액자 트림, 정원 테두리, 띠 두르기. 넓이가 필요한 경우 (안쪽 채움):   · 카펫 / 페인트 / 잔디 씨 / 타일 깔기. 🔍 'around → 둘레', 'cover → 넓이'.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.10 Lesson 10.4 'Same Perimeter, Different Areas / Same Area, Different Perimeters' pp.425-428
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 7 Lessons 19-20 — Perimeter & Area Relationships
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: M01 함정 — 절대 곱하지 말기 (둘레)
learn.content: 흔한 실수: 둘레인데 l×w 곱함. 예: 5×3 직사각형 → 둘레 15 (잘못!) → 정답 16. ✅ 둘레 = 더하기. ❌ 곱하기 = 넓이. 🔍 합리성 검사: 모든 변≈10 → P≈40, A≈100. P가 100이면 의심!

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.10 Lesson 10.4 'Same Perimeter, Different Areas / Same Area, Different Perimeters' pp.425-428
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 7 Lessons 19-20 — Perimeter & Area Relationships
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

They have the same perimeter but different areas
They have different perimeters and different areas
try.answer: They have the same perimeter but different areas
try.hint: Calculate both perimeter and area for each rectangle.
guided_steps: Wait — recalculate: A P=18, B P=22. Different P, same Area.

practice_r2.question: Two rectangles BOTH have area 24 sq cm. Rectangle A is 6×4. Rectangle B is 8×3. Which has greater perimeter?
practice_r2.explanation: A: P=2×(6+4)=20 cm. B: P=2×(8+3)=22 cm. 같은 넓이, 다른 둘레. B가 더 길쭉할수록 둘레 큼.

practice_r3.question: Find two different rectangles that each have an area of 36 sq cm. Calculate the perimeter of each. Which has the smaller perimeter?
practice_r3.answer: Example: 9×4 → Area=36, P=26. 6×6 → Area=36, P=24. The square (6×6) has the smaller perimeter.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.10 Lesson 10.4 'Same Perimeter, Different Areas / Same Area, Different Perimeters' pp.425-428
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 7 Lessons 19-20 — Perimeter & Area Relationships
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

practice_r3.question: Explain in your own words why perimeter and area are different. Why can two shapes have the same perimeter but different areas?
practice_r3.answer: Perimeter measures distance around (linear). Area measures space inside (square units). Shapes can be stretched differently — a long thin rectangle and a squarish rectangle can have the same perimeter but different amounts of space inside.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.10 Lesson 10.4 'Same Perimeter, Different Areas / Same Area, Different Perimeters' pp.425-428
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 7 Lessons 19-20 — Perimeter & Area Relationships
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

practice_r3.question: A rectangle has an area of 20 sq cm and a perimeter of 18 cm. What are the length and width?
practice_r3.answer: Length = 5 cm, Width = 4 cm. Check: Area = 5×4=20 ✓. P=(5+4)×2=18 ✓.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.10 Lesson 10.4 'Same Perimeter, Different Areas / Same Area, Different Perimeters' pp.425-428

verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

accept: P=16 같고 A 다른 두 직사각형
practice_r3.explanation: 직사각형 l+w = 8 인 모든 쌍이 P=16. 가능: 7×1, 6×2, 5×3, 4×4 — 모두 P 같음, 넓이 점점 큼 (정사각에 가까울수록 넓이 ↑).
